rationale: The citing paper explicitly states it “extends traditional conjoint and Luo, Kannan, and Ratchford (2008)” by adding external social input (E) to a needs-based preference model, indicating the 2008 paper is a direct conceptual/methodological antecedent rather than a passing mention. The cited paper’s core contribution (HB model linking objective attributes, latent subjective characteristics, and prediction/design performance) closely matches the citing paper’s stated gap around subjective-criteria preference measurement, so this pair is plausible for substantive relation assessment.
